# seerr_radarr_quality_profile (Data Source)

Look up a Radarr quality profile by name via /api/v3/qualityprofile.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) Radarr API key used to read quality profiles.
- `name` (String) The Radarr quality profile name to match exactly.

### Optional

- `base_url` (String) Base path when Radarr is served under a subpath.
- `hostname` (String) Radarr hostname when url is not provided.
- `port` (Number) Radarr port when url is not provided.
- `url` (String) Full Radarr URL. If set, it takes precedence over hostname, port, use_ssl, and base_url.
- `use_ssl` (Boolean) Use HTTPS when url is not provided.

### Read-Only

- `quality_profile_id` (Number) The numeric quality profile ID matching name.
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON for the matched quality profile.
- `status_code` (Number) HTTP status code for the quality profile lookup.
